summary: Atomic Booking Overbooking Prevention Testing Complete - All 10 tests passed. Fixed race condition bug in atomic booking by adding snapshot isolation (ReadConcern='snapshot', WriteConcern='majority'). Concurrency test now correctly shows 1 success and 9 conflicts for 10 simultaneous requests.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing rooms and guests from seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Atomic booking implementation tested and working. Key fix: Added ReadConcern('snapshot') and WriteConcern('majority') to MongoDB transaction for proper isolation. All overlap scenarios tested: exact overlap (409), partial overlap (409), full overlap (409), adjacent dates (200), different rooms same dates (200). Concurrency test with 10 parallel requests: exactly 1 succeeds, 9 get 409. Cancel endpoint: PUT /api/pms/bookings/{id} with Idempotency-Key header and {status: 'cancelled'} body.

quick_booking_basic_creation.description: Creates booking with correct data, returns 200

overlapping_dates_same_room.description: Second booking with same room/dates returns 409

adjacent_dates_allowed.description: Checkout=next check-in is NOT a conflict, both succeed

partial_overlap_blocked.description: Booking overlapping end of existing returns 409

different_rooms_same_dates.description: Different rooms with same dates both succeed

cancelled_booking_doesnt_block.description: After cancelling, same room+dates can be booked again

bug_fix_applied.issue: Race condition allowing 2+ bookings for same room/dates under concurrent load
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: MongoDB transaction was not using snapshot isolation
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added ReadConcern('snapshot'), WriteConcern('majority'), ReadPreference.PRIMARY to session.start_transaction()
bug_fix_applied.verification: Concurrency test now shows exactly 1 success and 9 conflicts for 10 parallel requests
